title: carduus medius subsp. carlinifolius
intro: Carduus medius subsp. carlinifolius, also known as the biennial thistle, is a subspecies of the Carduus medius plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Carduus medius subsp. carlinifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
